english: What is the boiling point of water in degrees Celsius?
hindi: पानी का क्रिस्टलीकरण बिंदु क्या होता है?
vietnamese: Nước sôi ở nhiệt độ bao nhiêu độ C?
correct_answer: The boiling point of water is 100 degrees Celsius at standard atmospheric pressure. This is the same for water everywhere on Earth.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating water boiling at a different temperature due to incorrect assumptions about atmospheric pressure or location.
bengali: জলের গলা বিন্দু কত ডিগ্রী সেলসিয়াস?
